query:
SELECT
                s.id as "id!: Uuid",
                s.name,
                s.description,
                s.content,
                s.created_at as "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                s.updated_at as "updated_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
               FROM skills s
               JOIN agent_skills ags ON ags.skill_id = s.id
               WHERE ags.agent_id = $1
               ORDER BY s.name ASC
